name: INVISIBLE WOMAN
description: The Invisible Woman is able to slip in and out of sight without a trace. No matter how intense the battle may be, Susan Richards always keeps her cool, conjuring up impenetrable force fields to protect herself and her team.
lore: Cosmic rays altered Susan Storm on a cellular level, granting her the ability to generate impenetrable force fields and to make herself fade from sight in an instant. Despite her frequent lack of visibility, it has always been perfectly clear that Sue is the force holding her family — the Fantastic Four — together. After the Timestream Entanglement, the Invisible Woman has taken full advantage of her powers, using stealth to explore locations too dangerous for her fellow heroes, especially going on rescue missions for civilians trapped by the creatures of the night.

abilities.name: Orb Projection
abilities.description: Launch a force field orbs that can pierce heroes, flying to maximum distance before returning to Invisible Woman; damaging enemies and healing teammates

stats.Special Effect: Orbs can pierce heroes and return to Invisible Woman after reaching their maximum distance. They damage enemies and heal teammates
stats.Damage: Deal 30 damage per hit upon being shot out and 15 damage per hit on its return journey.
stats.Healing Amount: Heal 50 health per hit upon being shot out and 40 health per hit on its return journey.

abilities.name: Guardian Shield
abilities.description: Generate a force shield in front of a selected ally or in front of you. The shield can block damage and provide Healing Over Time to nearby allies. Enemies that pass through the shield are slowed

stats.Special Effect 1: Before the shield is destroyed, Invisible Woman can choose to reproject the shield onto a selected teammate at any time
stats.Special Effect 2: After the shield has been damaged, Invisible Woman can press the F key to reclaim the shield and restore its value
stats.Special Effect 3: If no Guardian Shield is present, pressing the recall key now deploys a shield in front of Invisible Woman

abilities.name: Psionic Vortex
abilities.description: Gather psionic energy and then cast it, upon impact or pressing the Ability key again, it erupts into a psionic vortex, continuously drawing in enemies and causing damage

stats.Casting: Single-cast projectile with delayed impact that also generates a spell field
stats.Special Effect: Applies a slow effect to enemies within the spell field; the closer they are to the center of the field, the greater the slow effect

abilities.name: Force Physics
abilities.description: Manipulate psionic energy to push or pull enemies in front of her

abilities.name: Invisible Boundary
abilities.description: Manifest an unseen force field within a chosen area, rendering allies inside undetectable by enemies and provide Healing Over Time. Enemies that pass through the field are slowed

stats.Casting: Targeted, generates a cylindrical spell field

abilities.name: Covert Advance
abilities.description: Enter Invisible state some time after disengaging from combat and grant yourself Healing Over Time

abilities.name: Veiled Step
abilities.description: Generate a force field at your feet, stepping on it propels her into the Invisible state

received.name: Fantasti-Force
received.description: The Invisible Woman taps into her powers, channeling Psionic Might to fortify Mr.Fantastic. This formidable force bolsters Mr.Fantastic, granting damage resistance. Once activated, they can continually generate Bonus Health, making up for lost Health

base.description: Generate a Flame Shield for a targeted ally that blocks incoming damage while providing a Continuous Healing aura to everyone nearby. Projectiles from teammates shot through the Flame Shield receive a Damage Boost. Enemies that pass though the shield are Slowed

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Human Torch, the Flame Shield boasts a larger radius and heavily increased shield value.

base.description: Invisible Woman and surrounding allies enter Invisible state, gaining healing and a Speed Boost. The effect ends if they take damage or the duration expires. Disengaging from combat for a duration will reenter the Invisible state.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Mister Fantastic, the healing and Speed Boost effects are enhanced, and the Invisible state duration is increased
